summary: Natural Nation is a mobile-first holistic wellness platform supported by a public brand website and Duey, an AI wellness mentor.
mission: Our mission is to provide practical, personalized guidance that turns holistic wellness goals into simple daily actions.
users: Adults age 21 and older seeking practical holistic wellness support
People who value whole-food, anti-inflammatory, and Dr. Sebi-inspired wellness principles
Users who benefit from clear daily protocols, progress visibility, and supportive AI guidance

buildStreams.name: Natural Nation Brand Website
buildStreams.purpose: Introduce the mission, establish trust, educate visitors, and guide qualified users toward the application.

buildStreams.name: Natural Nation Mobile Application
buildStreams.purpose: Deliver onboarding, personalized blueprints, daily protocols, progress tracking, scores, and Duey guidance.

buildStreams.name: Duey AI Mentor
buildStreams.purpose: Provide practical, non-medical wellness education, accountability, clarification, and personalized guidance.

coreUserExperience: Begin as a guest, select wellness goals, and complete guided onboarding
Receive a personalized wellness blueprint generated from Founder-approved rules
Enter the Day 1 dashboard with a clear daily mission
Follow a time-based Daily Protocol Timeline
Track energy, digestion, mood, sleep, and protocol completion
Ask Duey for clear explanations and practical guidance
Upgrade to a registered account without losing progress

deploymentPhases.title: MVP Launch
deploymentPhases.description: Core implementation — onboarding, blueprint, dashboard, daily protocol, scores, progress, Duey, account upgrade, and public website.

deploymentPhases.title: Integrations
deploymentPhases.description: Expansion implementation — wearables, deeper analytics, notifications, advanced personalization, and approved external integrations.

deploymentPhases.title: Community & Growth
deploymentPhases.description: Growth implementation — Community, broader member relationships, coaching options, and scalable growth systems.

components.name: Website Builder
components.supports: Public brand experience and web publishing
components.reason: Natural Nation needs a trusted public presence.

components.name: App Builder
components.reason: The primary member experience is delivered through the application.

components.name: Authentication
components.reason: Members must retain progress when upgrading from guest access.

components.name: Database
components.reason: Personalized wellness information must persist securely.

components.name: AI Team
components.reason: Duey is a central part of the Natural Nation experience.

components.name: Knowledge
components.supports: Approved rules, decisions, and mentor guidance
components.reason: Founder-approved knowledge must guide the system consistently.

components.name: Assets
components.supports: Brand, Duey, interface, and production media
components.reason: Approved visual assets must remain organized and reusable.

components.name: Deployments
components.reason: Both experiences require controlled release and version management.

components.name: Analytics
components.reason: Basic insight will help improve the experience after launch.

components.name: Notifications
components.reason: Thoughtful reminders may support member consistency.

components.name: Billing
components.reason: Billing changes scope, security, access control, and launch planning.

components.name: Community
components.reason: Community can strengthen long-term engagement after the core experience is proven.

openDecisions.title: MVP subscription billing
openDecisions.question: Should paid subscription billing be included in the first Natural Nation MVP release?
openDecisions.impact: This determines whether payment security, subscription access, receipts, and billing operations are included in Phase 1.

approvalEffect: Approval establishes this Blueprint as the execution contract for future AI planning and implementation. Protected changes remain unavailable until authentication, approval, and audit controls are ready.
actionBarEffect: Sets this Blueprint as the approved execution contract.
